race_meta.race_name: Mowden Park RFC Novices' Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner wind your neck in (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Wind Your Neck In with 26.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Wind Your Neck In > Shan't Wait, but actual result was Wind Your Neck In (IRE) > Saint Polo (FR). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
